heroSubtitle: Accept Zcash in minutes. Non-custodial. Zero buyer data. No middleman.
feature1Desc: Your keys, your funds. CipherPay never holds your ZEC. Payments go directly to your shielded address.
feature2Desc: Every payment uses Zcash shielded transactions. No transparent addresses, no leaking metadata.
feature3Desc: Accept ZEC from AI agents via the {link} protocol. One API call to verify shielded payments programmatically.
step2Desc: Create your catalog in the dashboard
step3Desc: Share links or integrate via API
oneApiCall: One API call to get paid
intHostedDesc: Share a payment link. No website needed. Works from social media, email, or chat.
intApiDesc: Create invoices, manage products, receive webhooks. Full programmatic control.
intWidgetDesc: Drop a script tag on any page. One line to add ZEC payments to any website.
intShopifyDesc: Install the app, add your API key. Accept ZEC on your Shopify store in minutes.
intWooDesc: Install the plugin, enter your API key. Your WordPress store accepts ZEC.
readySubtitle: Set up in under a minute. No KYC. No middleman. Just ZEC.
